name: McCartney Academy
summary: A lineage-centered private academy: STEM, emerging technologies, civic literacy, and the leadership formation Black children deserve.

name: Lineage Farms · FarmBlock
summary: Food sovereignty as infrastructure: cooperative urban agriculture, land trusts, and a blockchain-anchored governance layer (FarmBlock) that records every contribution and every distribution.

name: Block to the Boardroom
summary: A pipeline from neighborhood organizing to policy authorship — civic education, public policy literacy, media training, and mobilization at every rung from the block to the boardroom.
